QueryPresets.Name: ORA Errors
QueryPresets.Query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /ORA-/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 200

QueryPresets.Name: ORA-01438
QueryPresets.Query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /ORA-01438/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 200

QueryPresets.Name: VPN DPD
QueryPresets.Query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /DPD/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 200

QueryPresets.Name: Timeout
QueryPresets.Query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /timeout/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 200

QueryPresets.Name: Recherche libre
QueryPresets.Query: fields @timestamp, @message | filter @message like /{SEARCH}/ | sort @timestamp desc | limit 200
